title: Pseudo Anonymised Jobs from Questionnaire R0
description: Variables from the jobs section of the first round of questionnaire for The Generations Study about the participant's history of working in industries that require night work, travelling, and other unique experiences. This data has been pseudo-anonymised by removing any personal identifiable information (PII) and shifting dates from their original data.

R0_IonizingRadiationJob.x-question: Have you ever had any jobs that involved working with ionising radiation?
R0_IonizingRadiationJob.description: Participant's history of jobs involving ionizing radiation

R0_RadJobStartYear_Shifted.name: R0_RadJobStartYear_Shifted
R0_RadJobStartYear_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_RadJobEndYear_Shifted.name: R0_RadJobEndYear_Shifted
R0_RadJobEndYear_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_RadJobDosimeterUse.x-question: Did you wear a dosimeter (dosage badge) for this job?
R0_RadJobDosimeterUse.description: Participant's use of dosimeter in radiation job

R0_RadJobWeeklyHrs.x-question: Average time per week working around ionising radiation (hours)

R0_RadJobWeeklyMins.x-question: Average time per week working around ionising radiation (minutes)

R0_RadJobMore.x-question: Cross here if you had more jobs involving ionising radiation

R0_NightWorkRecentTenYrs.x-question: Over the last ten years, have you had any jobs involving late evening or night work?

R0_NightWorkStart_Shifted.name: R0_NightWorkStart_Shifted
R0_NightWorkStart_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_NightWorkEnd_Shifted.name: R0_NightWorkEnd_Shifted
R0_NightWorkEnd_Shifted.description: Derived and pseudo-anonymised year. The date is anchored at 1 July (day 1, month 7) of the reported year, shifted by a participant-specific offset, and only the year of the shifted date is stored. If the year component is missing the derived value is null.

R0_NightWorkDaysWeek.x-question: Average number of days per week working at night

R0_NightWorkHrsWeek.x-question: Average number of hours worked between 10pm and 7am on these days

R0_NightWorkMore.x-question: Cross here is you had more jobs involving night work
R0_NightWorkMore.description: Flag for additional night work episodes
